components.name: Structural Substrate
components.notes: Concrete, masonry, or approved substrate; must be clean, dry, and free of contaminants.

components.name: Rigid Insulation
components.notes: Polyisocyanurate or approved rigid insulation per thermal design.

components.name: Cant Strip
components.notes: 45-degree cant strip at base of parapet wall. Minimum 4-inch face dimension.

components.name: RamFlash PMMA Primer
components.notes: Apply RamFlash PMMA Primer to all surfaces receiving membrane.

components.name: RamFlash PMMA Membrane Resin (Base Coat)
components.notes: Apply catalyzed RamFlash PMMA Membrane resin to primed surface.

components.name: RamFlash Fleece Reinforcement
components.notes: Embed RamFlash Fleece into wet PMMA resin. Full saturation, no dry spots or fish-mouths.

components.name: RamFlash PMMA Membrane Resin (Seal Coat)
components.notes: Apply catalyzed seal coat over fully embedded fleece.

components.name: RamFlash Catalyst
components.notes: BPO catalyst mixed into PMMA resin per manufacturer ratio.

components.name: Termination Bar with Sealant
components.notes: Continuous termination bar at top of flashing. Fasteners at max 8 inches o.c. Sealant bead along top edge.

components.name: Metal Coping
components.notes: Formed metal coping cap. Concealed clips. Drip edges both sides.

assembly_constraints.description: PMMA flashing must extend minimum 8 inches above finished roof surface.
Cant strip required at base-of-wall to roof deck transition.
Mechanical termination with continuous bar and sealant required.
Fleece must be fully saturated — no dry spots, voids, or fish-mouths.
Substrate must be clean, dry, structurally sound, and free of contaminants.
